query:
insert into Elements (
                last_collect_nr,
                name,
                file_hash,
                definition_line,
                start_line,
                end_line,
                kind,
                content_hash
            )
            values (
                $1,
                $2,
                $3,
                $4,
                $5,
                $6,
                $7,
                $8
            )
            on conflict (file_hash, definition_line)
            do update set
                last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                start_line = excluded.start_line,
                end_line = excluded.end_line,
                kind = excluded.kind,
                content_hash = excluded.content_hash
